Scenario.overview: Communications Industry Complex The attackers compromise the SolarWinds Orion platform through a supply chain attack, injecting malware into the platform via compromised updates. They then use various techniques to maintain persistence, escalate privileges, and collect sensitive data before exfiltrating it over alternative protocols.
Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: Internet-facing assets File User Account Process Network Traffic Application Log DNS Record
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: General Access Method File Modification (Mechanism) User Account Authentication (Mechanism) Reg.exe Utility Network Traffic Flow (Mechanism) File Access (Mechanism) Exfiltration Over Alternative Protocol Network Traffic Content (Mechanism)

stage.name: Reconnaissance
stage.description: The attacker gathers information about the target organization using artificial intelligence.

stage.name: Resource Development
stage.description: The attacker develops custom malware to inject into the SolarWinds Orion platform.

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.description: The attacker injects malware into the SolarWinds Orion platform through compromised updates.

stage.name: Execution
stage.description: The attacker schedules a task to execute malware at regular intervals.

stage.name: Persistence
stage.description: The attacker uses WMI to maintain persistence on the compromised system.

stage.name: Privilege Escalation
stage.description: The attacker exploits a vulnerability in the SolarWinds Orion platform to gain elevated privileges.

stage.name: Defense Evasion
stage.capec: CAPEC-191: Read Sensitive Constants Within an Executable
stage.description: The attacker obfuscates malware code to evade detection.

stage.name: Credential Access
stage.description: The attacker attempts to brute-force credentials using compromised credentials.

stage.name: Discovery
stage.description: The attacker scans the network for vulnerable systems and services.

stage.name: Lateral Movement
stage.description: The attacker uses remote services to move laterally within the network.

stage.name: Collection
stage.description: The attacker collects sensitive data from compromised systems.

stage.name: Exfiltration
stage.description: The attacker exfiltrates collected data over alternative protocols.

stage.name: Impact
stage.description: The attacker disrupts communications service to cause impact.

Scenario.summary: The SolarWinds Compromise scenario involves a complex attack chain that compromises the SolarWinds Orion platform through a supply chain attack, maintains persistence, escalates privileges, collects sensitive data, and exfiltrates it over alternative protocols, ultimately causing impact to the communications industry.
